title: How firmware updates work and what to do if one fails
content: Firmware updates are delivered through the companion app and install automatically when the device is idle and connected to Wi-Fi, unless automatic updates are disabled in Settings. If an update becomes stuck or fails partway through: 1) Do not unplug the device while 'Updating...' is shown. 2) If it fails and shows an error, power-cycle the device and retry from Settings > Firmware > Check for Updates. 3) Updates typically take 5-10 minutes; if a specific version consistently fails after three attempts, note the exact version numbers involved (current and target) so a hardware fallback path can be checked. Recent release notes: v3.2.0 improved Wi-Fi reconnect reliability; v2.3.1 fixed a Bluetooth audio sync issue.
